top_signals.title: Indra CEO to Leave in Latest Shakeup at Spain’s Defense Champion
top_signals.summary: Indra Sistemas SA, the defense company backed by the Spanish government, is set to replace its top executive in the latest management shakeup after its controversial chairman stepped down last month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin has shed $5,000 within days. The data says this selloff could worsen
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
